subject: A winged eldrazi horror creature with dark feathered wings and trailing red fleshy tendrils flying through open sky
description: A disturbing aerial creature fills the frame — it has broad, dark feathered wings spread wide in flight, but the body beneath them is not avian: instead, the central mass is a pale, skull-like or eyeless face fused with a ribbed torso, and several thick red-pink fleshy tendrils dangle below. Feathers shed as it moves. The coloring contrasts dark grey-black wings with vivid red-pink trailing tissue. The sky behind is open blue with white clouds and a faint spiral haze. No recognizable limbs or weapons are present.
foreground: dark-winged horror with pale fused face and trailing red tendrils in flight
background: open blue sky with white clouds
emotion: menacing and alien — something wrong made to fly
